style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. At the top, a box labelled SLOP CONTENT shows a tall stack of pages beside a small clock, captioned MINUTES TO MAKE, DAYS TO VET. At the bottom, a box labelled VIBE-CODED APP shows a glossy application window with a small rust crack through it, captioned QUICK GRATIFICATION, TECHNICAL DEBT. Running horizontally between the two boxes, a clear straight arrow labelled THE DISCIPLINED PATH points to a small finished, checkmarked deliverable, with a caption reading VERIFY, THEN TRUST. The two cautionary boxes are lighter; the central path is the strongest line. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. On-image labels in Canadian French read: box 'CONTENU CAMELOTE' captioned 'DES MINUTES À FAIRE, DES JOURS À VALIDER'; box 'APPLICATION CODÉE À L'INSTINCT' captioned 'GRATIFICATION RAPIDE, DETTE TECHNIQUE'; arrow 'LE CHEMIN DISCIPLINÉ'; caption 'VÉRIFIER, PUIS FAIRE CONFIANCE'. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. At the top, a box labelled SLOP CONTENT shows a tall stack of pages beside a small clock, captioned MINUTES TO MAKE, DAYS TO VET. At the bottom, a box labelled VIBE-CODED APP shows a glossy application window with a small rust crack through it, captioned QUICK GRATIFICATION, TECHNICAL DEBT. Running horizontally between the two boxes, a clear straight arrow labelled THE DISCIPLINED PATH points to a small finished, checkmarked deliverable, with a caption reading VERIFY, THEN TRUST. The two cautionary boxes are lighter; the central path is the strongest line. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. On-image labels in Canadian French read: box 'CONTENU CAMELOTE' captioned 'DES MINUTES À FAIRE, DES JOURS À VALIDER'; box 'APPLICATION CODÉE À L'INSTINCT' captioned 'GRATIFICATION RAPIDE, DETTE TECHNIQUE'; arrow 'LE CHEMIN DISCIPLINÉ'; caption 'VÉRIFIER, PUIS FAIRE CONFIANCE'.
